title: Summoner
description: Adds 3 new staffs to summon minions that fight by your side as well as a ballista that rapidly shoots enemies
body:
The Summoner mod is a mod to add new tools that allow summoning mobs to fight alongside you

# **Staffs**
**Staffs are tools that when you hit a mob with them, summon are mob.
These staffs include:**
- **Spider Staff**
- **Zombie Staff**
- **Ghast Staff**


# **Ballista**
**The ballista is an entity that can be crafted using 3 planks, one log, 2 iron blocks, a crossbow, and 2 arrows.
The ballista can be ridden and shoots any monsters in a nearby area to it**
